title: Tariffs, Trump's Economic Endgame, Market Chaos, Bitcoin Reserve, CoreWeave IPO
description:
(0:00) The Besties welcome Joe Lonsdale!

(3:51) Jason recaps an eventful week in Washington

(8:29) Trump's tariffs: endgame, impact, chaos, master plan

(26:25) DOGE, IRA grifting, do campaign contributions need to be capped?

(53:42) CoreWeave IPO

(1:03:36) Trump 2.0 favoring Main Street over Wall Street, bond market breakdown, re-balancing the economy

(1:14:19) State of Ukraine/Russia, the Western alliance, and how techno-optimism plays into the future of defense pacts

(1:24:31) GPT-4.5, Grok 3 on X, and the Golden Age of language models

(1:33:47) All-In for F1 Miami!

(1:37:34) David Sacks joins Jason to break down the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and Digital Asset Stockpile

(1:48:30) Sacks addresses clearing all of his crypto-related positions prior to Inauguration Day

(1:57:23) Importance of disclosures and updates on a market structure bill

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses Trump's economic endgame, tariffs, market chaos, and the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. They also cover the CoreWeave IPO, the state of Ukraine/Russia, and the Golden Age of language models. Guest Joe Lonsdale joins the conversation.

takeaways.text: Trump's tariffs may be part of a larger economic plan
The Strategic Bitcoin Reserve is a new US initiative
CoreWeave's IPO is a significant event in the tech industry
The Ukraine/Russia conflict has implications for global defense
Language models are entering a Golden Age
The US needs to re-balance its economy
Disclosures are important for market transparency

sentiment.notes: The podcast covers a range of topics, with both optimistic and cautious views expressed. The hosts seem to be cautiously optimistic about the future of the US economy and technology.

notable_moments.description: David Sacks discusses the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve
The hosts discuss the CoreWeave IPO
